internal_issues.description: EXP-285 TLDR/lead arithmetic ambiguity: '9+1+1+1' reads as 12 items not 11. PRED-090 must be clearly shown as inside the nine.

internal_issues.description: EXP-285 PRED-088 paragraph drops geographic qualifier. The 70°N, 135°W coordinates are near Beaufort Sea/Mackenzie Delta (~3,000 km from Hudson Bay anomaly center), not adjacent to it.

breaking_news_suggestions.headline: April 2026: 11 Dome Predictions Expired, Zero Discriminating Results
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: All eleven dome predictions whose test windows closed in April 2026 failed to produce dome-discriminating outcomes. Nine restated pre-existing public measurements, one (PRED-105) hit the 14-day silence rule and is classified tacit withdrawal, and one (PRED-106) cites a non-existent WIN-071. The §6.12 analysis is drafted and curmudgeon-reviewed, awaiting operator headline selection before publication.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: N=11 closure cohort in a single month is the largest single-month resolution batch to date, extending §6.11's 0-for-2 conclusion to 0-for-11. First tacit_withdrawal verdict class applied (PRED-105). Directly challenges dome's prospective-bucket credibility at larger sample size.
